case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. LEO STOSTO DOMINGO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGO, LEO STOSTO $2,970.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,035.97, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,970.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, LEO STOSTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/22/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP-RETURN TO SENDER."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.97) SERVED OCT-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, LEO STOSTO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-06-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO DEC. 6, 2016 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, LEO STOSTO
